_README: Curated US 'soccer towns' — places with abnormally strong youth-soccer infrastructure (active club leagues, MLS academy pipelines, local turf-field density, large youth-player populations, immigrant communities with strong soccer culture). Used to drive the golden-glow overlay on the Tekky map + audience-targeted scrape priorities. Three independent 0-100 scores let the map filter by Tekky's three audiences. Expand this list freely — anything 50+ on any score lights up gold.

_AUDIENCES.parent: Density of parents buying gear for youth players (rec leagues, club kids, school programs)
_AUDIENCES.coach: Density of coaches, club owners, training-program operators, school AD overlap
_AUDIENCES.player: Density of self-improvement-driven players (academies, residencies, ECNL/MLS Next concentrations)

towns.name: Frisco
towns.why: Home of FC Dallas + Toyota Stadium; massive ECNL + MLS Next pipeline.

towns.name: Plano
towns.why: DFW soccer corridor — Solar SC, Sting Dallas; high-income youth-club density.

towns.name: McKinney
towns.why: Spillover from Frisco; growing club roster, packed turf complexes.

towns.name: Carmel
towns.why: Carmel United pipeline + private-school soccer culture.
